text.tspan: u2022 NO LOCKS on the mutable state u2014 only one thread touches it
u2022 NO RACE CONDITIONS by construction
u2022 NO DEADLOCKS u2014 only one thread doing mutation
u2022 EASY TO REASON ABOUT u2014 strictly serial state machine
u2022 OBVIOUS ORDERING u2014 FIFO commit order matches FIFO request order
u2022 NATURAL BACKPRESSURE u2014 bounded queue rejects/blocks when full
u2022 EASY REPLICATION u2014 just replicate the command log (u2192 Raft/Paxos input)
BOUNDED QUEUE: if updater is slow, queue fills up,
producers block or get rejected u2014 sheds load BEFORE OOM.

g.text: FIFO dequeue, one at a time
